sentences.english: Walking is one of the easiest and most effective forms of exercise.
sentences.korean: 걷기는 가장 쉽고 효과적인 운동 중 하나예요.

sentences.english: You don't need any equipment or a gym membership.
Doctors recommend at least thirty minutes of walking per day.
Walking improves your mood reduces stress and helps you sleep better.
sentences.korean: 걷기는 기분을 개선하고 스트레스를 줄이고 수면에 도움을 줘요.

sentences.english: I try to walk to work instead of taking the bus at least three times a week.
sentences.korean: 일주일에 최소 세 번은 버스 대신 걸어서 출근하려 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
